name: distortionz_shotspotter
changelog: v1.1.7 — Dispatch card moved to right side, vertically centered. v1.1.6 put it on the left, but sir wanted it back on the right just not colliding with the chat notify. Solution: same right edge (right:24px) but vertically centered with top:50% + transform:translateY(-50%) so the card sits at mid-screen. Chat notify stays at top-right corner; this card sits at mid-right. Different vertical zones, zero overlap regardless of how tall the notify gets. Slide-in animation reverted to horizontal-only entry from the right. v1.1.6 — (broken) left-side position.
